title: Aliche's Spicy Lemongrass Chicken
description: A fusion of spicy and lemongrass flavors in a traditional Ethiopian-style chicken dish.

ingredients.name: Lemongrass
ingredients.notes: Use only the white and light green parts

ingredients.name: Gritty
ingredients.notes: Gritty bread crumbs can be used as a coating

ingredients.name: Ye
ingredients.notes: Ethiopian flatbread, torn into small pieces

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the bruised lemongrass and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
4. Add the torn ye and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and add the salt, black pepper, and lemongrass.
7. Simmer for 10-12 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Serve hot, garnished with additional lemongrass if desired.
9. Serve with injera bread or over rice, if desired.
